channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Redesigning a Dated Cottage Loft with Nordic Design Elements
item.description: The article addresses the challenge of revitalizing a cluttered cottage loft used by children for TV and gaming. Key recommendations include installing motorized blinds to manage glare from windows, r...

item.title: New Seasons of Reality TV Shows and Celebrity Insights
item.description: The article highlights upcoming entertainment content, including the return of the reality TV series 'Izingane zeS’thembu' for its fourth season, set to air on Mzansi Magic. It also features Linda Mto...

item.title: JustMarkets Introduces Web-Based Trading Platform for Enhanced Accessibility
item.description: JustMarkets, a multi-asset brokerage firm, has launched a web-based trading platform called the Web Terminal, enabling clients to trade directly from their browsers without needing software downloads....

item.title: A German Man's Pursuit of the Perfect Bread Slice
item.description: Jan, a German man known online as Germanbreadcutter, has gained over 100,000 followers across social media platforms for his meticulous bread-slicing technique. Using high-end knives and digital calip...

item.title: Shoprite's AI assistant enables rapid grocery shopping with personalized recommendations
item.description: A Checkers Sixty60 customer used ShopriteX's AI shopping assistant 'Pixie' to complete a R1,500 online grocery order in just 15 seconds. The technology, which learns user preferences and predicts need...

item.title: Republican Lawmaker Vows to Resist GOP Budget After Being Snubbed from Key Meeting
item.description: Rep. Erin Houchin (R-IN) expressed frustration over being excluded from a Camp David meeting where GOP leaders discussed a reconciliation bill. The bill, which includes cuts to Medicare and Medicaid f...

item.title: Tanzania's Strong Representation in AFRIMMA 2026 with 11 Nominated Artistes
item.description: Tanzania has emerged as the most represented country in East Africa at the 2026 African Muzik Magazine Awards (AFRIMMA), with 11 artistes and creatives earning nominations across multiple categories. ...

item.title: Australia faces rising fuel costs amid escalating US-Iran tensions over oil shipments
item.description: The resumption of hostilities between the United States and Iran has disrupted oil flows through the Strait of Hormuz, prompting concerns about soaring diesel prices in Australia. This conflict, which...

item.title: Field Marshal Asim Munir holds high-level meetings in Turkiye to strengthen Pakistan-Turkiye defence cooperation
item.description: Chief of Defence Forces and Chief of Army Staff Field Marshal Asim Munir is on an official visit to Turkiye aimed at further strengthening the long-standing strategic and defence partnership between P...

item.title: Philadelphia Eagles Secure $15 Million Trade with New England Patriots Amid NFL Activity
item.description: The latest developments in the NFL trade market have seen the Philadelphia Eagles gain significant momentum after a reported $15 million trade agreement with the New England Patriots. This move is par...

item.title: US Embassy Warns Nigerians About Proper Use of B1/B2 Visas
item.description: The US Embassy has issued a stern warning to Nigerians holding B1/B2 visas, emphasizing that misuse of these visas for purposes like employment or long-term study could result in permanent visa bans. ...

item.title: Legal Dispute Over Professional Rivalry in Infectious Disease Field
item.description: A high-profile lawsuit has emerged between two Canadian infectious disease specialists, Andrea Boggild and Isaac Bogoch, over a 14-year professional rivalry. Boggild, medical director of the Universit...

item.title: UAAP Grants Ateneo Additional Time for Adili and Baterbonia Investigation
item.description: The University Athletic Association of the Philippines (UAAP) has extended the deadline for Ateneo de Manila University to provide results from the investigation into allegations involving Divine Adil...

item.title: Mayor Nancy Binay Announces Marriage of Bea Alonzo and Vincent Co
item.description: Mayor Nancy Binay has officially confirmed the marriage of celebrities Bea Alonzo and Vincent Co, marking a significant personal milestone for the couple. The announcement was made through a press sta...

item.title: Major Banks Report Strong Quarterly Performance
item.description: The Wall Street Journal's live coverage highlights the robust financial performance of major banks during the latest quarter. Despite macroeconomic uncertainties, institutions like JPMorgan Chase, Ban...

item.title: David Gilliver's Miniature Worlds Reimagining Everyday Objects as Epic Landscapes
item.description: Scottish photographer David Gilliver’s 'Little People' series transforms everyday objects into miniature epic landscapes, redefining scale and perspective. By shrinking environments to just two centim...

item.title: AAP distances itself from Tahir Hussain after his conviction in Delhi riots case
item.description: Arvind Kejriwal, AAP national convenor, distanced himself from Tahir Hussain, an expelled AAP leader convicted in the murder of IB staffer Ankit Sharma during 2020 Delhi riots. BJP's Amit Malviya clai...

item.title: Canadian Return Trips to the U.S. Rise Slightly Amid Ongoing Travel Boycott
item.description: Canadian resident return trips to the U.S. increased by 3.2% in June 2026 compared to the same month in 2025, marking the third consecutive month of growth after a prolonged travel boycott. This uptic...

item.title: UK government introduces new measures to address escalating cost-of-living crisis
item.description: The UK government has announced a series of new measures aimed at alleviating the worsening cost-of-living crisis, which has left millions of households struggling with rising prices for essentials su...

item.title: Security Measures for Ol Kalou By-Election Include 1,000 Police and Water Canons
item.description: The Inspector General of Police, Douglas Kanja, has announced the deployment of over 1,000 officers and water cannons to ensure security during the Ol Kalou by-election on July 16. All 114 polling sta...
